notes: Post-M1 sprint. Starts 2026-04-25 (after M1 gate close on 04-24). Two-front focus: (1) refactor invoices.ts to unblock the deferred money-safety tasks M1-MONEY-05/06 that the swarm couldn't touch because of file size, (2) ship the deferred WS-2 security tasks that don't touch invoices.ts. Pre-requisite for M2 WS-3 Stripe billing wire-up. Scope matches plan §2 and §3 deferred work per DIR-005.

tasks.description: Split backend/src/routes/invoices.ts into focused modules (pulled forward from plan §7)
tasks.context:
File: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts (1173 lines, plan §M3-CQ-03 target ≤300)

This refactor is a PREREQUISITE for M1-MONEY-05 and M1-MONEY-06, both of which need surgical edits to invoices.ts that MiniMax cannot produce reliably on a file this size (confirmed: 3 destructive-rewrite attempts across sessions).

Extract to:
  - services/invoice-query.ts  (list/search/stats endpoint handlers)
  - services/invoice-mapper.ts  (mapInvoice helper + SELECT_FIELDS constant)
  - services/invoice-validator.ts  (paymentDetails schema, chain validation)
  - services/invoice-state-machine.ts  (VALID_TRANSITIONS map + transition-handler with PaymentEvent recording from M1-MONEY-02)
  - routes/invoices.ts  (wire-up only, ≤300 lines)

Behavior must be identical — supervisor rejects any endpoint shape change. Existing tests must pass unchanged.

Acceptance: backend/src/routes/invoices.ts ≤ 300 lines. All existing tests PASS. One new test file services/__tests__/invoice-state-machine-unit.test.ts exercises the extracted state-machine in isolation.

tasks.description: InvoiceAudit table — make paymentDetails merge audit-traceable (resumed from week-115)
tasks.context:
DEFERRED from week-115 per DIR-005 because invoices.ts was too big for agents to surgically edit. Unblocked by M3-CQ-03-A above.

File: backend/src/services/invoice-state-machine.ts (post-refactor) + supabase/migrations/005_invoice_audit.sql

Change: On every metadata write (PATCH /:id/metadata), append to a new InvoiceAudit table (invoiceId, actor apiKeyId, beforeJson, afterJson, changedAt). Reject keys that start with 'tax', 'settlement', 'txHash', 'paidBy' — those are system-owned.

Acceptance: Test confirms protected keys return 400; every accepted PATCH produces exactly one InvoiceAudit row.

DEFERRED from week-115 per DIR-005. Unblocked by M3-CQ-03-A above.

Files: backend/src/services/invoice-validator.ts (post-refactor) + supabase/migrations/006_idempotency_keys.sql + backend/src/routes/invoices.ts wire-up

Change: Require Idempotency-Key header on POST /v1/invoices. First write stores {key, apiKeyId, invoiceId, responseBody} in a new IdempotencyKey table (24-hour TTL). Second write with same key returns the stored response.

Acceptance: Test: same key + same body returns identical response; same key + different body returns 409 IDEMPOTENCY_CONFLICT.

tasks.description: Webhook HMAC verification on delivery (resumed from week-116)
tasks.context:
DEFERRED from week-116 per DIR-005. New-file task, agent-tractable.

Files: backend/src/routes/webhooks.ts, backend/src/services/webhook-dispatcher.ts (new)

Change: On outbound delivery, compute HMAC-SHA256(secret, body) and send as X-Invoica-Signature: t=<ts>,v1=<hex>. On POST /v1/webhooks/:id/test receive-path, verify signature using crypto.timingSafeEqual. Document in docs-site/webhook-signatures.md.

Acceptance: Tampered body fails verification; replayed timestamp older than 5 min fails.

tasks.description: Log redactor — introduce backend/src/lib/logger.ts, replace raw console.* (resumed from week-116)
tasks.context:
DEFERRED from week-116. New-file task, agent-tractable but large (touches many backend files).

Change: Introduce backend/src/lib/logger.ts that redacts email, apiKey (4-char prefix only), paymentAddress, txHash (4-char prefix only), Authorization header. Replace all raw console.log/error/warn/debug in backend/src/ with the logger.

Acceptance: Grep for 'console\.' in backend/src/ returns 0 hits. Log-redactor test asserts redaction on every field.

tasks.description: Split metrics into internal/external — public surface shows only real customers
tasks.context:
Plan §6.1. Critical prerequisite for any public-facing metrics display: today's dashboard/website number would leak self-dealing if exposed. Invoice triage 2026-04-21 confirmed all 13 existing invoices are internal test data.

Approach: use the isTest flag added by the invoice-cleanup migration (migration 007, applied 2026-04-25). Update backend/src/routes/metrics.ts, invoice-stats.ts, settlement-summary.ts to accept an ?includeTest=true query param (default false). Public dashboard calls with default; internal 'system health' admin panel calls with includeTest=true.

Acceptance: GET /v1/metrics returns only external customer data by default. GET /v1/metrics?includeTest=true returns everything. Test covers both branches.

tasks.description: Live on-chain Skale Base integration test (Scope 2 follow-up to 2026-04-22 API-layer smoke test)
tasks.context:
Scope 1 (API-layer smoke test) passed 2026-04-22: invoice creation with chain='skale', DE VAT 19% applied, PaymentEvents UNIQUE gate blocks replay. Mock txHash only.

Scope 2 (this task): real USDC transfer on Skale Base (mainnet 1187947933 or testnet-Sepolia 324705682), scanned by the EVM settlement detector, invoice auto-transitions to SETTLED via the real on-chain event.

Files to create:
  - scripts/test-skale-onchain.ts — test harness that:
      * reads 2 wallet private keys from .env (TEST_WALLET_A_PK, TEST_WALLET_B_PK) — owner funds these before running
      * creates an invoice via API with Wallet B's address as paymentAddress
      * signs and submits a USDC transfer from Wallet A to Wallet B on Skale Base
      * calls the settlement detector programmatically (or waits for PM2 settlement-poller) to confirm detection
      * verifies PaymentEvents row is written with the REAL on-chain txHash (not mock)
      * verifies Invoice.status transitions to SETTLED
  - docs/engineering/skale-onchain-test-setup.md — owner-facing runbook:
      * how to generate 2 fresh wallets (viem or ethers)
      * how to fund them with gasless compute credits on Skale Base (pre-paid compute credits per Skale docs)
      * how to acquire USDC on Skale Base (bridge from Base via Skale portal, or use Skale Base Sepolia testnet USDC faucet for first run)
      * how to run the harness and interpret output

Acceptance: one clean run (testnet OR mainnet) where a real on-chain USDC transfer on Skale Base is detected by Invoica's settlement detector and auto-marks an invoice SETTLED. Attach the txHash + block explorer link to the task note on completion.

Dependencies: none (chain config for Skale Base already live in main per commit 8c3ea35). Ideal to run BEFORE any marketing with Skale (for truth-in-capability).
